response.justification: Bogdan is a broadly experienced, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack work and genuine high-scale exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby), but the resume shows no experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry, or growth-measurement experience — the core domain of this role. There is also no evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope such as leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams at enterprise scale; his trajectory is senior IC roles at small-to-mid companies. Strong engineer, wrong domain fit for a Principal experimentation-systems position.
strengths: 19+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, well beyond the 8-year bar
Real production-scale experience: low-latency, high-throughput microservices (millions of HTTP requests/second) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus a strong testing/TDD culture and open-source maintainership
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, metrics/telemetry platform, or statistical analysis experience anywhere on the resume
No demonstrated Principal-level scope — no multi-team initiatives, org-wide platforms, or cross-functional leadership at enterprise scale
Limited depth in the JD's primary languages (Python/C#/C++ are peripheral; core strengths are TypeScript/Node and DLang, which is niche)

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
